title: Aiko launches 545 W back-contact solar module with 25% efficiency
summary: The Chinese manufacturer said its new back-contact module delivers up to 545 W and over 25% efficiency in a compact rooftop format for residential, C&I, and off-grid applications.

title: InfinityPV releases new compact solar simulator
summary: The Danish company says its new product is ideal for small to medium-sized solar cell testing. It can simulate light conditions in the 390–700 nm range.

title: Cubenergy launches FlexCombo 2.0 flexible energy storage block
summary: The FlexCombo 2.0 is an AC Block designed to support the evolving requirements of power systems, including grid stability, regulatory compliance, and scalable project development.

title: BESS asset operation in CAISO is complex, but lean teams can leverage advanced analytics
summary: California's rapid adoption of energy storage has been a major success, but market participation is complex and competitive, write Matt Drazenovich of TWAICE and Chris Swanson of Fullmark Energy.

title: RWE brings online four BESS projects in 13GW US clean energy portfolio
summary: Energy firm RWE added 2GW to its US operating capacity in 2025, bringing its total operational capacity to nearly 13GW across the country.

title: Google bets big on 30GWh of Form Energy’s iron-air battery storage despite efficiency trade-offs
summary: Recently, utility Xcel Energy announced it would install 30GWh of US startup Form Energy’s iron-air batteries at a data centre in Pine Island, Minnesota, owned by tech giant Google.

title: Price jump: Chinese firms’ battery cell quotes approach 0.4 RMB/Wh, system prices follow suit
summary: China’s energy storage sector may be at the start of a price trend reversal, with recent data showing price increases.

title: Argentina launches 700MW/2,800MWh BESS tender
summary: The Argentinian Government has launched a new battery energy storage system (BESS) tender seeking 700MW and 4-hour duration.

title: Long-duration tech still outcompeted by lithium, trade group advocates for ‘valuing diversity’
summary: Global long-duration energy storage (LDES) deployment figures soared in 2025, but newer technologies risk being outcompeted by the incumbent, lithium-ion (Li-ion).

title: Base Power launches 100MW VPP programme in Texas
summary: Residential energy storage startup Base Power is collaborating with utility Denton County Electric Cooperative (CoServ) to deploy 100MW of residential energy storage across North Texas, US.
